name: digital-tattoo
description: DIGITAL TATTOO — offline in-browser multi-agent interrogation game with WebLLM (inference only)

scripts.prepare-publish: npm install && npm run fetch-model:all && npm run verify-models -- --require-lite --require-hq && npm run build && npm run verify-models -- dist --require-lite --require-hq
scripts.prepare-publish:pages: npm install && npm run fetch-model:pages && npm run verify-models -- --require-lite --allow-missing-default && npm run build && npm run verify-models -- dist --require-lite --allow-missing-default
